# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.

Prevent elasticsearch logs exposed.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=false
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
      - xpack.license.self_generated.type=basic
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    networks:
      - elk
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -qE '\"status\":\"(green|yellow)\"'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    logging:
      driver: "none"
    restart: unless-stopped

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.username=elastic
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.password=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/patterns:/usr/share/logstash/patterns:ro
      - logstash_data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    ports:
      - "5044:5044"
      - "5000:5000/tcp"
      - "5000:5000/udp"
      - "9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '\"status\":\"green\"' || curl -s http://localhost:9600 | grep -q 'logstash'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.encryptedSavedObjects.encryptionKey=${ENCRYPTION_KEY:-a]3@#$%^&*()_+1234567890abcdefgh}
      - SERVER_NAME=kibana
      - SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0
      - TELEMETRY_ENABLED=false
    volumes:
      - kibana_data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        [
          "CMD-SHELL",
          "curl -s http://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q 'available'"
        ]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped

  setup:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elk-setup
    environment:
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - KIBANA_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-changeme}
    networks:
      - elk
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    command: >
      bash -c '
        echo "Waiting for Elasticsearch to be ready...";
        until curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} http://elasticsearch:9200 | grep -q "cluster_name"; do
          sleep 5;
        done;
        echo "Setting kibana_system password...";
        curl -s -X POST -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/kibana_system/_password \
          -d "{\"password\":\"${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-changeme}\"}";
        echo "";
        echo "Creating logstash_writer role...";
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/role/logstash_writer \
          -d "{
            \"cluster\": [\"manage_index_templates\", \"monitor\", \"manage_ilm\"],
            \"indices\": [
              {
                \"names\": [\"logstash-*\", \"syslog-*\", \"nginx-*\", \"app-*\", \"filebeat-*\"],
                \"privileges\": [\"write\", \"create\", \"create_index\", \"manage\", \"manage_ilm\"]
              }
            ]
          }";
        echo "";
        echo "Creating logstash_internal user...";
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_security/user/logstash_internal \
          -d "{
            \"password\": \"${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}\",
            \"roles\": [\"logstash_writer\"],
            \"full_name\": \"Logstash Internal User\"
          }";
        echo "";
        echo "Creating ILM policy...";
        curl -s -X PUT -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          http://elasticsearch:9200/_ilm/policy/logs-policy \
          -d "{
            \"policy\": {
              \"phases\": {
                \"hot\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"0ms\",
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"rollover\": {
                      \"max_age\": \"7d\",
                      \"max_primary_shard_size\": \"25gb\"
                    }
                  }
                },
                \"warm\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"30d\",
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"shrink\": { \"number_of_shards\": 1 },
                    \"forcemerge\": { \"max_num_segments\": 1 }
                  }
                },
                \"delete\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"90d\",
                  \"actions\": { \"delete\": {} }
                }
              }
            }
          }";
        echo "";
        echo "Setup completed successfully!";
      '
    logging:
      driver: "none"
    restart: "no"

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:
    driver: local
  logstash_data:
    driver: local
  kibana_data:
    driver: local

networks:
  elk:
    driver: bridge
    name: elk-network

# --- FILE: logstash/config/logstash.yml ---
# http.host: "0.0.0.0"
# xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts: ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
# xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.username: "elastic"
# xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.password: "${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"
# path.config: /usr/share/logstash/pipeline
# pipeline.workers: 2
# pipeline.batch.size: 125
# pipeline.batch.delay: 50
# log.level: info

# --- FILE: logstash/pipeline/01-input.conf ---
# input {
#   beats {
#     port => 5044
#     ssl => false
#   }
#
#   tcp {
#     port => 5000
#     codec => json_lines
#     tags => ["tcp_input"]
#   }
#
#   udp {
#     port => 5000
#     codec => json
#     tags => ["udp_input"]
#   }
# }

# --- FILE: logstash/pipeline/02-filter.conf ---
# filter {
#   # Parse syslog messages
#   if [type] == "syslog" or "syslog" in [tags] {
#     grok {
#       patterns_dir => ["/usr/share/logstash/patterns"]
#       match => {
#         "message" => "%{SYSLOGTIMESTAMP:syslog_timestamp} %{SYSLOGHOST:syslog_hostname} %{DATA:syslog_program}(?:\[%{POSINT:syslog_pid}\])?: %{GREEDYDATA:syslog_message}"
#       }
#       add_tag => ["syslog_parsed"]
#     }
#     date {
#       match => ["syslog_timestamp", "MMM  d HH:mm:ss", "MMM dd HH:mm:ss"]
#       target => "@timestamp"
#     }
#     mutate {
#       add_field => { "log_type" => "syslog" }
#     }
#   }
#
#   # Parse Nginx access logs
#   if [type] == "nginx-access" or "nginx" in [tags] {
#     grok {
#       match => {
#         "message" => '%{IPORHOST:client_ip} - %{DATA:user_name} \[%{HTTPDATE:access_time}\] "%{WORD:http_method} %{DATA:url} HTTP/%{NUMBER:http_version}" %{NUMBER:response_code} %{NUMBER:body_sent_bytes} "%{DATA:referrer}" "%{DATA:user_agent}" %{NUMBER:request_time}'
#       }
#       add_tag => ["nginx_parsed"]
#     }
#     date {
#       match => ["access_time", "dd/MMM/yyyy:HH:mm:ss Z"]
#       target => "@timestamp"
#     }
#     geoip {
#       source => "client_ip"
#       target => "geoip"
#     }
#     useragent {
#       source => "user_agent"
#       target => "ua"
#     }
#     mutate {
#       convert => {
#         "response_code" => "integer"
#         "body_sent_bytes" => "integer"
#         "request_time" => "float"
#       }
#       add_field => { "log_type" => "nginx-access" }
#     }
#   }
#
#   # Parse application JSON logs
#   if [type] == "app" or "app" in [tags] {
#     if [message] =~ /^\{/ {
#       json {
#         source => "message"
#         target => "app_log"
#       }
#     }
#     mutate {
#       add_field => { "log_type" => "application" }
#     }
#   }
#
#   # Common enrichment for all logs
#   mutate {
#     remove_field => ["@version", "host.name"]
#     add_field => {
#       "environment" => "${ENVIRONMENT:production}"
#       "pipeline_processed" => "true"
#     }
#   }
#
#   # Drop health check noise
#   if [url] =~ /^\/(health|ready|alive)/ {
#     drop {}
#   }
#
#   # Fingerprint for deduplication
#   fingerprint {
#     source => "message"
#     target => "[@metadata][fingerprint]"
#     method => "MURMUR3"
#   }
# }

# --- FILE: logstash/pipeline/03-output.conf ---
# output {
#   if [log_type] == "syslog" {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       user => "logstash_internal"
#       password => "${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"
#       index => "syslog-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       document_id => "%{[@metadata][fingerprint]}"
#       ilm_enabled => true
#       ilm_policy => "logs-policy"
#     }
#   } else if [log_type] == "nginx-access" {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       user => "logstash_internal"
#       password => "${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"
#       index => "nginx-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       document_id => "%{[@metadata][fingerprint]}"
#       ilm_enabled => true
#       ilm_policy => "logs-policy"
#     }
#   } else if [log_type] == "application" {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       user => "logstash_internal"
#       password => "${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"
#       index => "app-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       document_id => "%{[@metadata][fingerprint]}"
#       ilm_enabled => true
#       ilm_policy => "logs-policy"
#     }
#   } else {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       user => "logstash_internal"
#       password => "${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"
#       index => "logstash-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       document_id => "%{[@metadata][fingerprint]}"
#       ilm_enabled => true
#       ilm_policy => "logs-policy"
#     }
#   }
#
#   # Uncomment for debugging
#   # stdout {
#   #   codec => rubydebug
#   # }
# }

# --- FILE: logstash/patterns/custom ---
# NGINX_ACCESS %{IPORHOST:client_ip} - %{DATA:user_name} \[%{HTTPDATE:access_time}\] "%{WORD:http_method} %{DATA:url} HTTP/%{NUMBER:http_version}" %{NUMBER:response_code} %{NUMBER:body_sent_bytes} "%{DATA:referrer}" "%{DATA:user_agent}"
# APP_LOG \[%{TIMESTAMP_ISO8601:timestamp}\] \[%{LOGLEVEL:level}\] %{GREEDYDATA:log_message}

# --- FILE: .env ---
# ELASTIC_PASSWORD=changeme
# KIBANA_PASSWORD=changeme
# ENCRYPTION_KEY=a7f3b2c1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5
# ENVIRONMENT=production
